title: Space Occupation Gain — the gain in owned dangerous space (F&B Eqs 7–9)
definition: Fernández & Bornn's real SOG: the GAIN in a player's owned-space quality (control × value) over a 3 s window — who MOVES INTO valuable space off the ball, not who merely stands in it (that is the OBSO board). Split active (running, >1.5 m/s) vs passive (walking into value). SOL = space lost.
